description.value:
[2 actions] Archetype, Auditory, Concentrate, Incapacitation, Mental, Occult

You perform the ultimate soul-music, flooding the battlefield with the overwhelming cold presence of death. All creatures within 60 feet must attempt a Will save (your class DC). Undead and constructs are unaffected.

ResultEffect
Critical SuccessNo effect
SuccessStunned 1
FailureParalyzed for 1 round and Drained 1
Critical FailureDominated (Will DC, same value) for 1 minute, Drained 2, and takes 4d8 cold + 4d8 negative damage

You can use Soul King's Concert once per day.

Suppressed while Sea-Bound.
description.gm: Soul King's Concert is intentionally the pinnacle of Revive-Revive power. The Dominated condition on a critical failure is strong — confirm with your table how Dominated works in your campaign context (standard PF2E Dominated lasts until the Will save is made at end of each turn).
